nodes.name: LC
nodes.summary: LC表示 IUCN 无危等级，当前关联8208种鸟类，如鸵鸟、鸸鹋、南方鶴鴕等8208种鸟类。

nodes.name: Green-rumped parrotlet
nodes.summary: Green-rumped parrotlet（Green-rumped parrotlet，学名 Forpus passerinus），在图谱中标记为无危（LC）物种，已关联11个分布地点节点，常见栖息地包括灌丛。

nodes.name: 亚马逊河
nodes.summary: 亚马逊河是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联34种鸟类，包括Red-throated piping guan、Marail guan、Spix's guan等34种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 灌丛
nodes.summary: 低矮木本植物占优势的陆地生境。

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: deliciosus | range_map = Forpus passerinus map.svg }} The green-rumped parrotlet (Forpus passerinus), also known as the green-rumped parakeet, is a species of parrot in the family Psittacidae that is found in northeastern South America and the Caribbean island of Trinidad

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: deliciosus | range_map = Forpus passerinus map.svg }} The green-rumped parrotlet (Forpus passerinus), also known as the green-rumped parakeet, is a species of parrot in the family Psittacidae that is found in northeastern South America and the Caribbean island of Trinidad

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: Green-rumped parrotlets are found in tropical South America, from the Caribbean regions of Colombia, Venezuela and Trinidad south and east to the Guianas and Brazil on the lower Amazon River. It has been introduced in Jamaica, Curaçao, Barbados and Tobago, and was not recorded on Trinidad prior to 1916. Along with the lilac-tailed parrotlet (Touit batavicus), they are the only parrotlet species to occur in the West Indies. Green-rumped parrotlets are fairly common in open, semi-arid habitat and are found residing in dry scrubland, deciduous woodland, gallery forest, farmland, forest edges, and deforested areas throughout their range
